name: Canon Backpack BP10 Camera Bag
description: The Canon Backpack BP10 is a professionally designed camera backpack that carries your Canon EOS camera, multiple lenses, and accessories in organized, padded compartments. Built for comfort during long shoots and travel.

name: Canon EF-EOS R Control Ring Mount Adapter
description: The Canon EF-EOS R Control Ring Mount Adapter allows you to use your existing EF and EF-S lenses on any Canon EOS R mirrorless camera. The customizable control ring adds a new level of shooting control to your adapted lenses.

specs.compatibility: EF / EF-S lenses to RF mount

name: Canon Speedlite EL-1 Professional Flash
description: The Canon Speedlite EL-1 is the flagship professional flash with active cooling, silent operation, and an innovative lithium-ion battery. It delivers consistent, reliable flash performance for wedding, event, and studio photographers.

name: Canon EOS R1
description: The Canon EOS R1 is the flagship professional mirrorless camera designed for sports news and wildlife photography. It features a groundbreaking full-frame stacked BSI CMOS sensor and DIGIC Accelerator processing for unmatched speed and autofocus performance. Built with legendary EOS-1D series durability it offers advanced Eye Control AF and incredible continuous shooting rates to ensure you never miss a critical moment.
features: DIGIC Accelerator and DIGIC X processing engines
Cross-type Dual Pixel Intelligent AF for superior tracking
Up to 40 fps continuous shooting with electronic shutter
Eye Control AF for intuitive focus point selection
In-Body Image Stabilization up to 8.5 stops

name: Canon EOS R10
description: The Canon EOS R10 is a versatile and compact APS-C mirrorless camera designed for hybrid content creators. Ideal for travel, wildlife, and everyday photography, it combines impressive speed with a lightweight body. Featuring a 24.2MP APS-C CMOS sensor and DIGIC X processor, the EOS R10 delivers high-quality images and 4K video, complete with Canon's renowned Dual Pixel CMOS AF II for precise subject tracking.
features: Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with subject tracking
Vari-Angle touchscreen LCD for flexible shooting angles

specs.videoResolution: 4K UHD up to 60p, Full HD up to 120p

name: Canon EOS R100
description: The Canon EOS R100 is an entry-level APS-C mirrorless camera designed to be the perfect first step into the EOS R system. Compact, affordable, and incredibly easy to use, it delivers a massive step up from smartphone photography with its 24.1MP sensor. Offering guided menus, impressive autofocus with eye detection, and 4K video recording, the EOS R100 makes capturing family moments and everyday adventures effortless.
features: Dual Pixel CMOS AF with Eye Detection
Creative Assist and Guided UI for beginners
Seamless connectivity with the Canon Camera Connect app

specs.videoResolution: 4K UHD at 24p (cropped), Full HD up to 60p
specs.continuousShooting: Up to 6.5 fps (One-Shot AF), 3.5 fps (Servo AF)

name: Canon EOS R3
description: The Canon EOS R3 is a high-performance full-frame mirrorless camera built for ultimate speed and reliability. It introduces an innovative 24.1MP stacked CMOS sensor that virtually eliminates rolling shutter distortion during high-speed bursts. With its integrated vertical grip Eye Control AF and 6K RAW video capabilities it is the perfect hybrid tool for demanding professionals.
features: Up to 30 fps continuous shooting with AF and AE tracking
Eye Control AF for instant focus point selection
In-Body Image Stabilization offering up to 8 stops of correction
Integrated vertical grip with robust weather sealing
Advanced vehicle animal and human tracking AF

specs.autofocus: Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with Eye Control AF

name: Canon EOS R5 Mark II
description: The Canon EOS R5 Mark II is a powerhouse full-frame mirrorless camera engineered for professionals demanding ultimate speed and resolution. Featuring a newly developed 45MP stacked back-illuminated sensor and DIGIC Accelerator processing it delivers unparalleled autofocus precision and significantly reduced rolling shutter. With 8K 60p RAW video capabilities Eye Control AF and up to 30 fps continuous shooting it is built to conquer any creative challenge.
features: DIGIC Accelerator and DIGIC X dual processing engines
Up to 30 fps continuous shooting with electronic shutter
In-Body Image Stabilization offering up to 8.5 stops
Eye Control AF for intuitive and rapid focusing

name: Canon EOS R50
description: The Canon EOS R50 is a highly compact and user-friendly APS-C mirrorless camera tailored for vloggers and content creators. With a 24.2MP sensor and advanced 4K video capabilities it brings professional-level quality to a portable form factor. Its intuitive interface coupled with Dual Pixel CMOS AF II and a fully articulating touchscreen makes capturing stunning vlogs and stills effortless.
features: 24.2MP APS-C CMOS sensor for high-resolution imaging
Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with advanced subject detection
Ultra-compact and lightweight body weighing just 375g
Vari-Angle touchscreen for easy self-recording and vlogging
Seamless smartphone connectivity via Bluetooth and Wi-Fi
Up to 15 fps continuous shooting with electronic shutter

specs.videoResolution: 4K UHD up to 30p, Full HD up to 120p

name: Canon EOS R6 Mark III
description: The Canon EOS R6 Mark III represents the next evolution in hybrid full-frame performance blending incredible speed with superior imaging capabilities. Designed for uncompromising creators it incorporates advanced AI-driven autofocus and improved 4K video recording features to handle complex professional workflows. With exceptional low-light sensitivity and robust image stabilization it ensures every shot is sharp and vibrant in any environment.
features: Advanced AI-driven Dual Pixel Intelligent AF
In-Body Image Stabilization up to 8.5 stops
Ultra-fast continuous shooting up to 40 fps
Enhanced dynamic range and exceptional low-light performance
Dual UHS-II SD card slots with updated interface

specs.videoResolution: 4K UHD up to 120p, Full HD up to 240p

name: Canon EOS R7
description: The Canon EOS R7 is a high-performance APS-C mirrorless camera built for speed, making it an excellent choice for wildlife, sports, and action photography. Inheriting technology from Canon's flagship models, it features a blistering 30 fps continuous shooting speed and an advanced 32.5MP sensor. With In-Body Image Stabilization (IBIS) offering up to 8 stops of correction and uncropped 4K 60p video, the EOS R7 is a true hybrid powerhouse.
features: Up to 30 fps continuous shooting with electronic shutter
In-Body Image Stabilization (IBIS) up to 8 stops
Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with deep learning subject tracking
Dual UHS-II SD card slots for extended shooting
Weather-sealed, durable body design for harsh environments

specs.videoResolution: 4K UHD up to 60p, Full HD up to 120p

name: Canon EOS R8
description: The Canon EOS R8 is a lightweight full-frame mirrorless camera that offers incredible photo and video performance for creators stepping up to a larger sensor. It features a 24.2MP CMOS sensor and DIGIC X processor delivering stunning 4K 60p video and blazing-fast 40 fps continuous shooting. With advanced Dual Pixel CMOS AF II and a highly portable body it is perfect for portraits events and travel photography.
features: Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with advanced subject detection
Up to 40 fps continuous shooting with electronic shutter
Advanced HDR PQ and Canon Log 3 support

specs.videoResolution: 4K UHD up to 60p, Full HD up to 180p

description: The Canon PowerShot G7 X Mark III is an advanced premium compact camera popular with vloggers and content creators. With a large 1-inch sensor, fast f/1.8 lens, and YouTube live-streaming capability, it's the ultimate pocket powerhouse.

description: The Canon PowerShot V10 is a pocket-sized vlogging camera with a built-in stand, wide-angle lens, and high-quality stereo microphone. Perfect for content creators who want professional-quality video from a device that fits in their pocket.

name: Canon RF 100-500mm f/4.5-7.1L IS USM Lens
description: The Canon RF 100-500mm f/4.5-7.1L IS USM is the ultimate super-telephoto zoom for wildlife and sports photography. With incredible 5x zoom range and 6-stop stabilization, it brings distant subjects dramatically close with professional L-series sharpness.

name: Canon RF 15-35mm f/2.8L IS USM Wide-Angle Lens
description: The Canon RF 15-35mm f/2.8L IS USM is a professional ultra-wide-angle zoom with constant f/2.8 aperture and built-in image stabilization. Perfect for landscape, architecture, and real estate photography with edge-to-edge sharpness.

name: Canon RF 24-70mm f/2.8L IS USM Lens
description: The Canon RF 24-70mm f/2.8L IS USM is the essential professional standard zoom lens for the EOS R system. With a fast f/2.8 constant aperture, 5-stop image stabilization, and exceptional L-series optics, it excels in every shooting situation.

name: Canon RF 50mm f/1.8 STM Lens
description: The Canon RF 50mm f/1.8 STM is a compact, affordable prime lens that delivers beautiful portraits with creamy background blur. Its lightweight design and fast f/1.8 aperture make it the perfect walk-around lens for EOS R cameras.

name: Canon RF 70-200mm f/2.8L IS USM Lens
description: The Canon RF 70-200mm f/2.8L IS USM redefines the telephoto zoom with a revolutionary compact design. This lightweight L-series lens delivers stunning portrait and sports imagery with smooth bokeh and lightning-fast autofocus.

name: Canon RF 85mm f/1.2L USM Portrait Lens
description: The Canon RF 85mm f/1.2L USM is the ultimate portrait lens, delivering an astonishingly shallow depth of field with silky smooth bokeh. L-series optics ensure tack-sharp subject detail while backgrounds melt into dreamy softness.

name: Canon RF-S 18-45mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens
description: The Canon RF-S 18-45mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM is an ultra-compact and lightweight standard zoom lens designed for APS-C EOS R cameras. Its slim profile makes it the perfect everyday walk-around lens for travel and casual photography.

name: Canon RF 70-200mm F2.8L IS USM Z
description:
The Canon RF 70-200mm F2.8L IS USM Z is a professional telephoto zoom lens engineered for uncompromising hybrid performance. Offering standard black or heat-reflective white finishes, it features an internal zooming mechanism and dual Nano USM motors for fast, ultra-smooth autofocus.

Designed to excel in both video and still photography, it delivers 5.5-stops of optical image stabilization and incorporates a smooth-action Iris Ring with an Auto Mode lock for seamless creative control.
features: 70-200mm F2.8 telephoto zoom for hybrid professional use
Internal zoom design with short 70° zoom rotation
Smooth action Iris Ring with Auto Mode position lock
Dual Nano USM motors for fast, smooth, and quiet autofocus
5.5-stops Optical Image Stabilisation (up to 7.5-stops with IBIS)
Compatible with optional Power Zoom Adapters
Dust and moisture-resistant L-series build quality

name: Canon RF 14-35mm F4L IS USM
description:
The Canon RF 14-35mm F4L IS USM is an incredibly versatile and compact ultra-wide-angle zoom lens designed for the EOS R system. With a constant f/4 maximum aperture and up to 5.5 stops of optical image stabilization, it excels in landscape, architecture, and travel photography.

Built to professional L-series standards, it features outstanding optical performance with UD and aspherical elements to reduce aberrations. The smooth and quiet Nano USM autofocus motor ensures sharp results for both stills and video, while its lightweight design makes it a perfect everyday companion.
features: 14-35mm ultra-wide zoom range for landscapes and architecture
Constant f/4 maximum aperture across the zoom range
5.5-stop Optical Image Stabilizer (up to 7 stops with IBIS)
Nano USM motor for fast, smooth, and quiet autofocus
Customizable Lens Control Ring for exposure settings
L-series build quality with dust and moisture resistance
Compact and lightweight design at just 540g

name: Canon RF 14mm F1.4L VCM
description:
The Canon RF 14mm F1.4L VCM is a highly specialized ultra-wide-angle prime lens designed to meet the rigorous demands of professional video and still production. Featuring a groundbreaking f/1.4 aperture for an ultra-wide field of view, it excels in astrophotography, architectural work, and immersive cinematic videography.

Equipped with a Voice Coil Motor (VCM) and Nano USM for exceptionally fast, quiet, and smooth hybrid autofocus, the lens also includes a dedicated Iris Ring for seamless manual aperture control during video capture. Built to L-series standards, it incorporates specialized optics to minimize distortion and features robust weather sealing.
features: 14mm ultra-wide-angle focal length for immersive perspectives
Ultra-fast f/1.4 maximum aperture for low-light mastery
VCM (Voice Coil Motor) and Nano USM for rapid, silent autofocus
Dedicated Iris Ring for smooth manual aperture control in video
Customizable Lens Function button and Control Ring
Advanced optical design with Aspherical and UD elements
L-series weather-sealed construction with Fluorine coating

name: Canon RF 15-30mm F4.5-6.3 IS STM
description:
The Canon RF 15-30mm F4.5-6.3 IS STM is an incredibly lightweight and versatile ultra-wide-angle zoom lens, perfect for vlogging, landscapes, and travel photography. Its compact design makes it an ideal everyday lens for EOS R system users looking to expand their creative perspectives.

Featuring up to 5.5 stops of Optical Image Stabilization and a smooth, quiet STM autofocus motor, it ensures sharp stills and stable video. The lens also offers impressive close-up capabilities, with a 0.52x maximum magnification when focusing manually.
features: 15-30mm ultra-wide focal range perfect for vlogging and landscapes
5.5-stop Optical Image Stabilizer for sharp handheld shooting
Smooth and quiet STM motor optimized for video recording
Incredibly compact and lightweight at only 390g
0.52x maximum magnification for macro-like close-ups (manual focus)

Advanced optics with PMo Aspherical elements

name: Canon RF 15-35mm F2.8L IS USM
description:
The Canon RF 15-35mm F2.8L IS USM is a professional L-series ultra-wide-angle zoom lens that forms part of Canon's 'holy trinity' of essential RF lenses. Offering a fast, constant f/2.8 maximum aperture, it is perfect for landscape, architecture, and astrophotography, delivering exceptional performance even in low-light conditions.

Built for uncompromised image quality, the lens features three aspherical and two UD elements, combined with SWC and ASC coatings to combat flare and ghosting. A 5-stop Optical Image Stabilizer and rapid Nano USM autofocus motor provide filmmakers and photographers with ultimate precision and stability.
features: 15-35mm ultra-wide zoom with a fast f/2.8 constant aperture
5-stop Optical Image Stabilizer for superior handheld shooting
Nano USM motor for high-speed, smooth, and quiet autofocus
Exceptional edge-to-edge sharpness with Aspherical and UD glass
SWC and ASC coatings to minimize ghosting and flare
L-series weather-sealed construction for harsh environments
Customizable Lens Control Ring for direct setting changes

The Canon RF 20mm F1.4L VCM is a highly specialized ultra-wide-angle prime lens designed to meet the rigorous demands of professional video and still production. Featuring a groundbreaking f/1.4 aperture for an ultra-wide field of view, it excels in astrophotography, architectural work, and immersive cinematic videography.

Equipped with a Voice Coil Motor (VCM) and Nano USM for exceptionally fast, quiet, and smooth hybrid autofocus, the lens also includes a dedicated Iris Ring for seamless manual aperture control during video capture. name: Canon RF 200-800mm F6.3-9 IS USM
description:
The Canon RF 200-800mm F6.3-9 IS USM is a versatile super-telephoto zoom lens that brings distant subjects closer than ever before. Designed for wildlife, sports, and aviation photography, it offers an unprecedented reach for a compact and relatively lightweight lens in the RF lineup.

With up to 5.5 stops of optical image stabilization, it ensures sharp handheld shots even at 800mm. The Nano USM motor delivers fast, smooth, and quiet autofocus, while the weather-resistant construction ensures durability in outdoor conditions. It is also fully compatible with Canon RF 1.4x and 2x extenders for even greater reach.
features: Massive 200-800mm zoom range for wildlife, sports, and aviation
5.5-stop Optical Image Stabilizer for excellent handheld stability
Nano USM motor for fast, smooth, and near-silent autofocus
UD glass elements for outstanding chromatic aberration control
Super Spectra Coating for rich, natural colours and reduced flare
Compatible with Canon RF 1.4x and 2x Extenders

name: Canon RF 16mm F2.8 STM
description:
The Canon RF 16mm F2.8 STM is an exceptionally compact and affordable ultra-wide-angle prime lens designed for the EOS R system. Weighing just 165g, it is the perfect companion for vlogging, landscape photography, architecture, and astrophotography.

Despite its small size, it boasts a fast f/2.8 maximum aperture, allowing for great low-light performance and shallow depth-of-field effects. The stepping motor (STM) provides smooth and quiet autofocus, making it highly capable for video recording, while the PMo aspherical lens element guarantees sharp, high-contrast images.
features: 16mm ultra-wide focal length ideal for vlogging and landscapes
Fast f/2.8 maximum aperture for excellent low-light performance
Incredibly compact and lightweight design at just 165g
Smooth and quiet STM autofocus motor optimized for video
PMo Aspherical element for high-resolution edge-to-edge sharpness
Super Spectra Coating minimizes ghosting and flare
0.13m minimum focusing distance for dynamic close-ups

name: Canon RF 16-28mm F2.8 IS STM
description:
The Canon RF 16-28mm F2.8 IS STM offers a fast, constant f/2.8 aperture in a versatile ultra-wide zoom range, making it an excellent choice for hybrid shooters, vloggers, and landscape enthusiasts. Designed to be lightweight and approachable, it expands creative possibilities for the EOS R system.

With integrated Optical Image Stabilization and a smooth, quiet STM autofocus motor, it delivers steady footage and sharp stills in a variety of lighting conditions. Its compact form factor and close focusing capabilities make it highly adaptable for travel and everyday shooting.

name: Canon EOS R5
description: The Canon EOS R5 is a revolutionary full-frame mirrorless camera that redefines what is possible for hybrid creators. It boasts a massive 45MP sensor capable of capturing stunningly detailed stills and internal 8K RAW video. Featuring class-leading Dual Pixel CMOS AF II and up to 8 stops of image stabilization it delivers uncompromising performance in any shooting scenario.

4K video recording up to 120p for smooth slow motion
In-Body Image Stabilization delivering up to 8 stops
Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with advanced subject tracking
20 fps continuous shooting with electronic shutter
Dual card slots supporting CFexpress and SD UHS-II

name: Canon EOS R5 C
description: The Canon EOS R5 C is a true hybrid cinema camera that combines the professional video features of the Cinema EOS range with the outstanding still photography capabilities of the EOS R system. It features a 45MP full-frame CMOS sensor and an internal cooling fan allowing for limitless 8K 60P RAW internal video recording without overheating. With advanced Dual Pixel CMOS AF and a lightweight magnesium alloy body it is the ultimate tool for filmmakers and hybrid creators demanding uncompromising performance.

Limitless 8K 60P RAW internal video recording with active cooling
Dedicated Cinema EOS menu system for professional video tools
Dual Pixel CMOS AF with Eye AF and EOS iTR AF X

Dual card slots supporting CFexpress and SD UHS-II

name: Canon EOS R6 Mark II
description: The Canon EOS R6 Mark II is a highly versatile full-frame mirrorless camera that balances immense speed with outstanding low-light performance. It boasts a 24.2MP CMOS sensor and can shoot continuously at a blistering 40 fps with its electronic shutter. Offering uncropped oversampled 4K 60p video and advanced subject tracking it is the perfect hybrid camera for action events and everyday storytelling.

Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with advanced subject detection
In-Body Image Stabilization delivering up to 8 stops
High-resolution 3.69m-dot OLED EVF with no blackout
Dual UHS-II SD memory card slots

name: Canon imageFORMULA P-215II
description: The Canon imageFORMULA P-215II is a compact, ultra-portable USB-powered document scanner designed for professionals on the move. Capable of scanning both sides of a document simultaneously at up to 15 ppm / 30 ipm (USB 3.0), it accepts a wide range of card and document sizes from business cards up to A4. With a 20-sheet ADF, no external power supply required, and bundled CaptureOnTouch software, it is the ideal companion for home office and mobile workers.

description: The Canon imageFORMULA R10 is an ultra-compact, USB bus-powered portable scanner that requires no driver installation, making it ideal for shared and mobile computing environments. Using the built-in CaptureOnTouch Lite software that runs directly from the scanner, users can start scanning immediately. With a 20-sheet ADF, duplex scanning at up to 12 ppm, and 600 dpi optical resolution, it delivers reliable digitisation of documents and receipts in a remarkably lightweight 0.9 kg body.
